creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
the file xemacs-21.1.10.tar.gz no longer exists on the source archive
sites, so the fetch step of the port fails.  The file is renamed
xemacs-21.1.10a.tar.gz now.

Fix: 

fetch the "a" file manually and rename it in the distfiles directory,
then run make.
How-To-Repeat: 
	
cd /usr/ports/editors/xemacs21
make fetch
